caption: A person wearing dark clothing and a red shirt operates a green all-terrain vehicle (ATV) inside a garage or shed. The ATV is positioned in the center of the frame, facing forward. To the right of the vehicle is a stack of several black tires and another vehicle partially visible. The environment is a cluttered workspace with various tools and equipment in the background. Across the sequence, the person steers the ATV, causing it to pivot slightly to the right. As the vehicle moves, the front wheels turn, and the overall angle of the ATV shifts relative to the camera. The lighting is bright, coming from an open doorway or window behind the vehicle, casting shadows forward onto the concrete floor. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
